title: nageia macrophylla var. maki
intro: Nageia macrophylla var. maki, also known as Maki tree or Maki nageia, is a plant species belonging to the Podocarpaceae family, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nageia macrophylla var. maki include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Nageia macrophylla var. maki can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
